en-US.description: Mathematics is the human tool for describing, understanding and revealing the laws of nature in an abstract and logical way, and the language for expressing these laws.
Logic is the foundation of philosophical exploration, used in core branches of philosophy such as logic, epistemology, and metaphysics.
Writing can use critical thinking to clearly and persuasively convey complex philosophical ideas. while quickly enhancing reading skills to identify logical errors in articles.
English is the core language of modern philosophy, with almost all philosophical works preserved in English.
